title: AverageIF, DivideIF options in formulas to avoid nulls/zeros being included
excerpt: Currently in Monday formulas there is no formulas such as: AverageIF or DivideIF or MultiplyIF, so that you can avoid using null or 0 in your number based equations. This is important when using columns like “rating” and…

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently in Monday formulas there is no formulas such as: AverageIF or DivideIF or MultiplyIF, so that you can avoid using null or 0 in your number based equations. This is important when using columns like “rating” and without said variables it is almost impossible to extrapolate useful information from multiple number or rating based columns.
